I

IacDefault - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse.PaymentEmvTag
Tag 9F0D.
Specifies the issuer’s conditions that cause a transaction to be rejected if it might have been approved online, but the terminal is unable to process the transaction online
IacDenial - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse.PaymentEmvTag
Tag 9F0E.
Specifies the issuer’s conditions that cause the denial of a transaction without attempt to go online
IacOnline - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse.PaymentEmvTag
Tag 9F0F.
Specifies the issuer’s conditions that cause a transaction to be transmitted online.
Iad - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.EmvTag
Issuer Application Data, tag 9F10
IconName - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Icon Type:
Id - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.MultiMerchant
Used to indicate the specific merchant id, valid between [0, 24].
IDENTIFY - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.constant.TransType
 
ImageDescription - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Product name or description, Conditional for models with different screen size and terminal capability.
ImageName - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
the name of image must be mt30_ad0/mt30_ad1/mt30_ad2
ImagePath - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Deprecated.
use ManageRequest.FilePath instead.
INCREMENTALAUTH - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.constant.TransType
 
init(POSListener) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.proxy.POSListenerLauncher
 
InitVector - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Initial vector for CBC mode:
It should 8 bytes and the default is “0000000000000000”.
InputData - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
The data used for MAC Calculation.
InputText - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Input Text:
InputTextTitle - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
The title that to be displayed, default as empty.
InputType - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Default Input Value with max length of 32.
INQUIRY - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.constant.TransType
 
Installments - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.MOTOECommerce
Total installments number.
InsuranceAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.AutoRentalInfo
Car-Rental Insurance Amount.
InteracAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
InteracAmount of SAF SUMMARY REPORT
InteracCount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
InteracCount of SAF SUMMARY REPORT
INVALID_PROCESS_TYPE - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.ProcessTransResult
 
INVALID_REQUEST - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.ProcessTransResult
 
InvNum - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest
POS system invoice/tracking number.
InvNum - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
POS system invoice/tracking number
IP_FORMAT_ERROR - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.ProcessTransResult
 
isbLoggable() - Method in class com.pax.poslink.log.SubLogSetting
 
isCancel - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.AbstractPosLink
 
isEnableProxy() - Method in class com.pax.poslink.CommSetting
 
isIsNeedConfigure() - Static method in class com.pax.poslink.LogSetting
 
isLoggable() - Static method in class com.pax.poslink.LogSetting
Get the current status of log
isProcessing - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.AbstractPosLink
 
isProcessing() - Static method in class com.pax.poslink.AbstractPosLink
 
isProxyProcessing() - Method in class com.pax.poslink.proxy.POSListenerLauncher
 
isSuccessful - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.entity.UploadResult
Returns true if both the terminal and POSLink upload logs successfully.
ISSUE - Static variable in class com.pax.poslink.constant.TransType
 
IssuerAuthData - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse.PaymentEmvTag
Issuer Authentication Data, tag 91
IssuerAuthenticationData - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
If issuer authentication data (tag 91) is returned by host, it shall be set to terminal.
IssuerResponseCode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse
This information is stored for the integrator for receipts, additional details on a transaction decline, reporting, etc.
IssuerResponseCode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse
This information is stored for the integrator for receipts, additional details on a transaction decline, reporting, etc.
IssuerScript1 - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
If issuer script (tag 71) is returned by host, it shall be set to terminal.
IssuerScript2 - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
If issuer script (tag 72) is returned by host, it shall be set to terminal.
IssuerScriptResults - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageResponse
Issuer script results, HEX format.
ItemAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.LodgingInfo.LodgingItem
The item amount.
ItemCode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.LodgingInfo.LodgingItem
The item code.
ItemCommodityCode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.LineItemDetail
Line item commodity code.
The international description code used to classify the item purchased.
ItemData - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Support more than one item.
ItemDescription - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.LineItemDetail
Specific description of the item purchased and related to the commodity code.
ItemDiscountAmount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.LineItemDetail
Discount amount applied to the item purchased.
Includes 2 implied decimals.
ItemDiscountRate - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.LineItemDetail
The rate at which the item is discounted.
ItemIndex - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Use to reference to a line when added.
ItemMeasurementUnit - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.LineItemDetail
The unit of measure code, refer to unit of measure sheet.
ItemQuantity - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.LineItemDetail
This field represents the number of units of the item purchased.
For TSYS: Includes 4 implied decimals.
For TransIT: No implied decimals.
ItemSequenceNumber - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.LineItemDetail
Line item sequence number.
ItemType - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.AutoRentalInfo.ExtraChargeItem
0 - Other
1 - Extra Mileage
2 - Gas
3 - Late Return
4 - One-Way Charge
5 - Parking Violation
ItemType - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.LodgingInfo.LodgingItem
The item type for the additional charge.
ItemUnitPrice - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.LineItemDetail
The unit price of the item purchased.
